svg.title: Inference: connecting what's written to what's meant
svg.desc: Two illustrated scenes showing examples of inference: a child going quiet at dinner, and winter imagery during a grief scene.
svg.text: Inference: connecting what's written to what's meant

g.text: A story keeps returning to winter
grey skies — during a grief scene.

svg.text: Inference is the gap between the words on the page and the meaning behind them.
Developing it requires practice — not just more reading.
